title: Friendzone
description: Exploring personal growth and overcoming negativity.
lyrics: Yo, this feeling's about hate, and hatin' things that don't go your way, you know? Cause when they don't, yeah, it's something like a spark within, you think you're not there, you think you're not good enough, you think that you're not the thing that they wanted or doubted, yeah. Feelin' that, feelin' that, nah, nah, feelin' that, feelin' that, nah, nah, nah. You know, hey, I'm here to tell you, through the wings of devils, through the wings of hell, you come up and breathe for air and go, oh, well, oh, well, not that way, take a different type of nun and be selfish, nah, I'm just be sittin' here like, hey, girl, whoa, I can be your friend no matter where we roll, that's how we been from the one, don't worry about my intents, it's not number one in your sense, be happy, be everything you see, I know I'm happy now, inside, in front of me, it's one thing that you help me do, become better at what I do, and I help people in past, here, I can't just see it, I'm glad that you're seein' everything that I just put in front of you, I'm glad you're bein' you, oh, no, the way you're lookin', powdery face, makeup when you're goin' out with the girls, know that you are the fire, the higher, the thing that makes me be better, cause I think that if I could have a friend like you, I'd be all contacts and contacts and rockin' and rockin', I'm sure you'll just be able to dot that, maybe sneak a little fire in to chase me, maybe do somethin' there that you see, you want to, without relating, without worryin' about all the jealousy that we relate to, that we bid to, that we bow to, that we roll to, I'm tryin' to be better here, tryin' to tell you every life is special, every moment that you spend here, relating and debating, have the people come back to you, have them come back to you, have this life be somethin' more than just a thing we do, I know I'm low, I know I'm low, but this is jealousy, in fact, you're of a soul, I know, and you're not here to fix what's been done, I'm here for you, I'm here for you, I want you to understand that, I'm here for you, whether you want to tell me that, don't play this act in all your sexual habitat, doesn't matter, I'm something like a canvas to bounce off, no matter if you don't feel right, you need that, I want to be just that in your life, girl, just that in the night, girl, just that when you think things aren't goin' right, missin' right takes you wrong, be comin' with another song, hey, I know it doesn't heal much, I know it doesn't feel much, I know it just seems like I'm just too much, but know that you deserve it, you deserve it, we can't beat the people, we can't beat the people, but you picked me, I'm not gonna be callous, nah, I'm not gonna not be understanding, it's what I write inside my life, it's what I write inside my life, I'm here to give you something in reverse, so that if you'd like, doesn't mean we have to be like, oh, the way I wanted it, like, hell, dude, like, I shoot for the stars, but remember, they're way up high, I shoot for the night, yeah, let me explain it just a little bit better to you, um, you're fucking cool, yo, haha, anyways, like, I can't believe I'm gonna fucking send this to you, but I'm going to, just to show you, man, that I feel all sorts of feelings and all,
